meta.title: streetwave® - Art Customization Studio
meta.description: Art customization and limited-edition projects for private clients and brands. Sneakers, apparel, art objects.

hero.title: Boutique Art Custom Studio
hero.subtitle: Personal projects and limited-edition collections for brands.

about.title: We are Street Wave.
about.text:
An art customization studio working with apparel, footwear, accessories, and spaces.

We create original projects for brands, events, and private clients - from one-of-a-kind pieces to limited-edition runs.

items.title: Personal Custom
items.desc: Sneakers, apparel, accessories, and art objects - unique work tailored to your vision.

items.title: Brand Projects
items.desc: Limited-edition collections, collaborations, and branded custom work.

items.title: Live Customization
items.desc: On-site customization at your event - a WOW factor for your audience.

items.title: Art / Paintings
items.desc: Original paintings and art objects. Street aesthetics on canvas.

steps.title: Idea
steps.desc: You describe your vision and share references.

steps.title: Concept
steps.desc: We create a sketch and finalize the details.

steps.title: Customization
steps.desc: Handcrafted by our artists using premium materials.

items.title: Signature Style
items.desc: Every piece is unique and entirely handcrafted.

items.title: Brand Experience
items.desc: Projects for Reebok, D&G, Pinko, Yandex, and more.

items.title: Full-Cycle Service
items.desc: From concept to delivery - everything in one place.

items.title: Premium Materials
items.desc: Professional Angelus paints, airbrushing, and protective coatings.

items.title: Professional Team
items.desc: Artists, designers, tailors, and customization specialists.

items.title: Worldwide Shipping
items.desc: Secure packaging and tracked delivery anywhere in the world.

shop.title: Coming Soon
shop.text: We're building an online shop with ready-made pieces and merch. Stay tuned for updates.

geo.title: Moscow & Worldwide
geo.text: Our studio is based in Moscow. We work with clients around the world. We accept items by mail and courier, and ship with tracking and insurance.

finalCta.title: Ready to create something unique?
finalCta.subtitle: Submit a request - let's discuss your idea.
